request.prompt_text:
You are extracting stage1 bundle features from a single image.
Return strict JSON only and follow the schema exactly.
Return every question_id exactly once.
Never omit a question_id and never repeat a question_id.
selected_answers must contain unique values only.
Every selected_answers value must be exactly one of the allowed_answers values.
If none is selected, selected_answers must be exactly ['none'].
Never mix none with any other signal.
Bad example: ['none', 'ridge_axis']
Good example 1: ['none']
Good example 2: ['ridge_axis', 'warm_advection']
manifest_id=synoptic_500hPa_stage1
domain=500hPa
stage=stage1
image_ref=up50_6h_2026040900
valid_time=2026040900
Bundles:
1. question_id=stage1_kp_nw_signal_bundle | region_id=kp_nw | region_label=한반도 북서 | lat_range=37~40N | lon_range=124~127E | allowed_answers=trough_axis|ridge_axis|cold_core|closed_cyclonic_circulation|tight_height_gradient|none | question_text=이 영역 내부에 존재하는 신호를 모두 선택하라.

4. question_id=stage1_kp_se_signal_bundle | region_id=kp_se | region_label=한반도 남동 | lat_range=34~37N | lon_range=127~130E | allowed_answers=trough_axis|ridge_axis|cold_core|closed_cyclonic_circulation|tight_height_gradient|none | question_text=이 영역 내부에 존재하는 신호를 모두 선택하라.

content.text: {"answers":[{"question_id":"stage1_kp_nw_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["trough_axis","cold_core"] ,"note":"A trough axis and cold core are evident around 37~40N, 124~127E area with lower height contours and cold temperature."},{"question_id":"stage1_kp_ne_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["ridge_axis"] ,"note":"A ridge axis is present near 37~40N, 127~130E with elevated height contours."},{"question_id":"stage1_kp_sw_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["ridge_axis"] ,"note":"A ridge axis is visible around 34~37N, 124~127E with elevated heights."},{"question_id":"stage1_kp_se_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["ridge_axis"] ,"note":"Ridge axis feature is seen in 34~37N, 127~130E with raised height values."},{"question_id":"stage1_ws_n_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["trough_axis"] ,"note":"There is an evident trough axis in 37~40N, 122~124E region indicated by lowered height contours."},{"question_id":"stage1_es_n_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["none"] ,"note":"No significant signals of the listed types are observed in 37~40N, 130~133E region."},{"question_id":"stage1_liao_bohai_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["cold_core","closed_cyclonic_circulation","tight_height_gradient"] ,"note":"In 38~41N, 120~123E region, there is a cold core with closed cyclonic circulation and tight height gradient as shown by tightly packed contours and cold temperatures."},{"question_id":"stage1_manchuria_s_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["closed_cyclonic_circulation"] ,"note":"A closed cyclonic circulation is visible in 41~45N, 123~128E with circular contour pattern."}]}

answers.note: A trough axis and cold core are evident around 37~40N, 124~127E area with lower height contours and cold temperature.
A ridge axis is present near 37~40N, 127~130E with elevated height contours.
A ridge axis is visible around 34~37N, 124~127E with elevated heights.
Ridge axis feature is seen in 34~37N, 127~130E with raised height values.
There is an evident trough axis in 37~40N, 122~124E region indicated by lowered height contours.
No significant signals of the listed types are observed in 37~40N, 130~133E region.
In 38~41N, 120~123E region, there is a cold core with closed cyclonic circulation and tight height gradient as shown by tightly packed contours and cold temperatures.
A closed cyclonic circulation is visible in 41~45N, 123~128E with circular contour pattern.

content.text: {"answers":[{"question_id":"stage1_kp_nw_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["ridge_axis","closed_cyclonic_circulation"] ,"note":"There is a ridge axis visible near the region and a closed cyclonic circulation marked with 'L' on the northwest part of the Korean Peninsula."},{"question_id":"stage1_kp_ne_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["ridge_axis"] ,"note":"A ridge axis extends into the northeastern part of the Korean Peninsula region."},{"question_id":"stage1_kp_sw_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["none"] ,"note":"No significant signals detected in the southwest region of the Korean Peninsula."},{"question_id":"stage1_kp_se_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["trough_axis"] ,"note":"A trough axis appears to be present in the southeast region of the Korean Peninsula."},{"question_id":"stage1_ws_n_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["ridge_axis"] ,"note":"Ridge axis indicated over the northern West Sea area."},{"question_id":"stage1_es_n_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["cold_core"] ,"note":"Cold core low pressure is observed in the northeastern East Sea region."},{"question_id":"stage1_liao_bohai_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["ridge_axis","tight_height_gradient"] ,"note":"Ridge axis and tight height gradient lines are present in Liaoning/Bohai region."},{"question_id":"stage1_manchuria_s_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["closed_cyclonic_circulation"] ,"note":"Closed cyclonic circulation is visible in southern Manchuria region."}]}

answers.note: There is a ridge axis visible near the region and a closed cyclonic circulation marked with 'L' on the northwest part of the Korean Peninsula.
A ridge axis extends into the northeastern part of the Korean Peninsula region.
No significant signals detected in the southwest region of the Korean Peninsula.
A trough axis appears to be present in the southeast region of the Korean Peninsula.
Ridge axis indicated over the northern West Sea area.
Cold core low pressure is observed in the northeastern East Sea region.
Ridge axis and tight height gradient lines are present in Liaoning/Bohai region.
Closed cyclonic circulation is visible in southern Manchuria region.
